task: Value network for proof states — gate3_v2 evaluation
architecture: Frozen GNN GoalEncoder (256-dim) → ValueHead MLP (256→128→1) → sigmoid

training.method: Keyword-hashed goal encodings via GNN GoalEncoder

evaluation.method: GNN best-first search on gate3_v2 (first 20 theorems)

observations.search_efficiency: Value-guided search was 2-3x faster per theorem (prunes unpromising branches)
limitations: Value head trained on keyword-hash encodings, not full GNN goal embeddings — limited discriminative power
Small test set (20 theorems) may not show differentiation
value_weight=0.3 may be too low to overcome lemma scoring dominance
